 The post  Orbital files plans for 100,000 orbital data centers  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: California delays emissions reporting deadline by 3 months
signals.summary: The California Air Resources Board said it will delay the compliance deadline for California’s SB 253 — the Climate Corporate Data Accountability Act — and propose “limited changes.”

signals.title: Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship, blocks Trump order
signals.summary: President Donald Trump attended oral arguments in the case, underscoring his staunch opposition to granting automatic citizenship to many immigrants' babies.

signals.title: FDA lets Philip Morris market Zyn nicotine pouches as less harmful than cigarettes
signals.summary: The Trump administration has expanded access to nicotine products despite concerns from public health critics about youth use and addiction.

signals.title: GOP Rep. Tom Kean says depression diagnosis caused months-long absence from Congress

signals.title: Poland awards $4.8 billion A26 submarine deal to Saab
signals.summary: Under a separate deal, Warsaw aims to urgently acquire a “gap filler” boat for its Baltic Sea operations that will be used to train its sailors.

signals.title: Duke gives up offshore wind lease for ‘partial’ reimbursement under Interior deal
signals.summary: A Duke Energy subsidiary paid $155 million for the lease in 2022, saying it could support up to 1.6 GW of capacity. The utility now says it will “refocus” nearly $129 million to projects that may include new nuclear, natural gas and grid enhancements.

signals.title: From wildfire risk to resilience: How asset investment tools can mitigate the growing challenge
signals.summary: A shift in asset investment planning can help utilities quantify risk and defend wildfire mitigation plans to regulators, stakeholders and the public, writes Jeff Pauska at IFS Copperleaf.

signals.title: Trump's massive defense budget, depleted war machine, spark U.S. state battle for business and jobs
signals.summary: Trump's huge defense budget request and a race to replenish weapons stocks while building hypersonic missiles lead to war between U.S. states for jobs.

signals.title: Oil prices set for steep monthly drop as Trump, Iran issue mixed messages on talks in Qatar
signals.summary: The moves come as oil traders monitor the prospect of U.S.-Iran talks in Doha on Tuesday.

signals.title: Trump administration expands list of graduate degrees subject to higher borrowing limits
signals.summary: Many graduate students will be subject to higher federal student loan caps than previously expected, after a court ruling last week. Here's what to know.

signals.title: Rocket Lab to acquire Iridium
signals.summary:
Rocket Lab is acquiring satellite telecommunications company Iridium for $8 billion as part of its effort to become an end-to-end space company. 
 The post  Rocket Lab to acquire Iridium  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: SOCOM is seeking a long-range kamikaze drone
signals.summary: Armed with loitering munitions, SOCOM MC-130J gunships and other aircraft would be able to hunt targets deep inside enemy lines.

signals.title: Latvia and Ukraine to open drone factory right on Baltic nation’s border with Russia
signals.summary: The Latgale region, where the new drone factory is to be built, is historically one of Latvia’s most economically disadvantaged.

signals.title: Major egg producers settle price inflation probe for $3.3 million
signals.summary: Cal-Maine Foods, Versova and Hickman's Egg Ranch agreed to settle allegations of price manipulation by the Justice Department and 17 states.

signals.title: Blue Origin pivots to redesigned launchpad after explosion in push to fly by end of 2026
signals.summary: Blue Origin won't be "rebuilding the same pad," and will instead adopt a configuration that was in development for a larger variant of its New Glenn rocket.

signals.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
signals.summary: "We've got inflation that's too high, and it's been too high for the past five years," Beth Hammack told CNBC's Sara Eisen.

signals.title: SSC Space, Firefly set 2028 target for first orbital launch from Sweden’s Esrange

signals.title: Nike is set to report earnings after the bell. Here's what to expect
signals.summary: Nike is expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.

signals.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
signals.summary: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.

signals.title: Cramer says this aerospace stock is significantly undervalued, sees 35% upside
signals.summary: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

signals.title: AeroVironment skyrockets 15% as dronemaker capitalizes on defense spending surge
signals.summary: AeroVironment is benefiting from U.S. plans to modernize the U.S. military and secure space.

signals.title: Medicare will start covering obesity drugs for the first time. Here's what patients should know
signals.summary: The move could unlock millions of new patients for Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly and expand access to medications that were previously out of reach for seniors.

signals.title: French biotech stock soars 40% after new data on experimental medicine
signals.summary: Shares of French biotech company Abivax soared Tuesday after it released fresh data on its lead drug for bowel disease.

signals.title: Japanese yen sinks to 40-year low, keeping intervention risks in focus
signals.summary: The Japanese yen weakened to its lowest level against the U.S. dollar since 1986 on Tuesday, keeping investors on alert for possible intervention from Japanese authorities.

signals.summary: The symbolism is notable as all four participating countries have signed up for some variation of France’s promised forward nuclear-deterrence scheme.

signals.title: Buffett delays annual donation to Gates Foundation pending review of Jeffrey Epstein ties: WSJ
signals.summary: This comes as the foundation continues to review its ties to the late sex offender Jeffery Epstein.

signals.title: Ex-Google recruiter: The No. 1 resume 'red flag' that makes hiring managers stop reading—and how to fix it
signals.summary: Former Google recruiter Farah Sharghi reveals the biggest mistake job seekers make with their resumes.

signals.title: Google Chromebook graft case sees Indonesia's former education minister jailed for 10 years
signals.summary: Makarim was found guilty in a case over the procurement of Google Chromebooks for schools.

signals.title: Virginia defines agrivoltaics, expanding opportunities for solar
signals.summary: Agrivoltaic projects must “ensure flexibility for farmers to adapt to market conditions and support operational needs,” according to the law.

signals.title: PJM opposes waiver for $2B gas-fired plant in fast-track interconnection review
signals.summary: Gas turbine backlogs prompted Advanced Power Services to seek changes to its project in PJM’s fast-track Reliability Resource Initiative interconnection review, but the grid operator said granting such a waiver would be unfair to other developers.

signals.title: Utilities are not spending enough on low-income household efficiency: ACEEE
signals.summary: Energy efficiency becomes more important as prices rise because it is “one of the only direct levers” a household has to reduce its bills, said Anna Johnson, senior policy manager at the American Council for an Energy-Efficient Economy.

signals.title: Why energy and utilities are moving from ‘systems’ mindset to a ‘connected platform ecosystems’ mindset powered by Vertical AI
signals.summary: How leading providers are connecting customer, workforce and grid operations into one Vertical AI ecosystem.

signals.title: Here's how Trump Accounts could affect women's retirement savings gap
signals.summary: While Trump Accounts are unlikely to directly improve retirement savings among women, there may be an indirect benefit, says one expert.

signals.title: Study argues bigger launch vehicles may not always be better
signals.summary:
As SpaceX and others pursue the development of very large launch vehicles, a new study suggests that there may be such a thing as a rocket that is too large.

signals.title: USMC awards $20 million contract for first autonomous ground vehicles
signals.summary: The Marine Corps is pursuing a first-of-its-kind $20 million production contract for fully autonomous ground vehicles.

signals.title: Do you really, really love your job? Then you're not alone, according to surprising results from this survey
signals.summary: Those surveyed showed a 78.9% rate of workers who "reported feeling positive at the end of their shifts."

signals.title: Short sellers keep betting against Pop Mart — even though it's been a losing trade

signals.title: Waymo and Uber end robotaxi pilot in Phoenix

signals.summary: Comcast plans to separate its cable and media divisions over the next year. This could set each company up for M&A, but there might not be any good options.
